description: Detects C# mutable static fields and properties that create hidden global state. Simplified from Rust: flags all field_declaration nodes inside classes. Cannot verify static modifier without readonly/const, check for [ThreadStatic] attribute, or distinguish public vs private for severity graduation. Structural detection only.

flag.message: Field declaration detected -- if static and mutable (not readonly/const), it creates hidden global state. Consider readonly, const, or dependency injection.
